organic.title: How to change a tire in 60 seconds
organic.snippet: I'm going to show you how just check your owner's manual for the location of your tools and your spare tire and take everything out before you jack up.

organic.title: How to Change a Tire - Tire Education
organic.snippet: Make sure to replace all wheel nuts and snug the nuts before lowering your vehicle. Use a star pattern when tightening the nuts to ensure the wheel is centered.

peopleAlsoAsk.question: How to change a flat tire by yourself?
peopleAlsoAsk.title: How to Change a Flat Tire in 9 Easy Steps | Allstate
peopleAlsoAsk.snippet:
Follow these steps to learn how to change a flat tire.
 1. Park in a safe location. If you have a flat, stop somewhere safe. ...
 2. Gather tools and supplies. ...
 3. Loosen the lug nuts. ...
 4. Position the jack and raise the car. ...
 5. Remove the lug nuts and flat tire. ...
 6. Install the spare tire. ...
 7. Lower the vehicle. ...
 8. Tighten the lug nuts.

peopleAlsoAsk.question: Is it easy to change a flat tyre?
peopleAlsoAsk.title: How To Change A Flat Tyre - Tips & Tricks - Choose Your Country
peopleAlsoAsk.snippet: You can change a flat tyre in 30 minutes if you have all the right equipment ready. We recommend that you familiarise yourself with this process at home on a sunny day - watch YouTube videos of the process and making sure you understand how the jack works and where the jack points are on your car.
